title: Deferred security items — DB migrations, CI/CD, and code hardening
summary: 12 of 13 findings fixed across three commits. Migration 3.0.0-to-3.1.0 adds totp_last_counter, share_token_hash (generated), and billing salt column. TOTP replay prevention, share-token hashing, BrowserBase IDOR ownership enforcement, AI chat rate limiting, admin brute-force rate limit, 2FA enrollment password gate, unsubscribe PII hardening, DKIM timeout, LIKE injection, CSP, env schema, and GitHub Actions SHA pinning all addressed. Remaining open: audit-01 (admin read audit trail — low severity, no exploit path, deferred to AUDIT-005).
